4b14e6b6-8e63-204d-3982-21de72727b75.name: Methodsportalisadedicatedandsecurewebpageforyourcu
4b14e6b6-8e63-204d-3982-21de72727b75.caption: Text
4b14e6b6-8e63-204d-3982-21de72727b75.defaultValue:
Method's portal is a dedicated and secure web page for your customers to access information shared with them.
</br>
Once logged in, customers can:</br>
- Access and update their account details </br>
- View and print transactions </br>
- Make payments to your company </br>
You can sign in as your customer to preview their portal experience by going to Account Settings > Portal > Navigation & Sign In As.
